'''Odos''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE-Odos" /> located in the [[Odos system/Legends|Odos system]],<ref name="EAOC" /> one of the [[Odos systems]]<ref name="CSWE-Odos" /> situated within the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />

Odos was located near the [[Chorios systems]].<ref name="CSWE-Odos" /> It was also located near the [[Exodo system/Legends|Exodo system]]<ref name="CSWE-Exodo">{{CSWECite|I|246|Exodo II}}</ref> and the [[Spangled Veil Nebula/Legends|Spangled Veil Nebula]].<ref name="CSWE-SVN">{{CSWECite|I|182|Spangled Veil Nebula}}</ref> The planet Odos was surrounded by [[Gas/Legends|gas]] [[Cloud/Legends|clouds]].<ref name="PoT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>

In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> while at [[Exodo II]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] were attacked by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] from the nearby [[Antemeridian sector/Legends|Antemeridian sector]].<ref name="PoT" /> They lost their pursuers by flying the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] through the gas clouds of Odos and the fringes of the Spangled Veil Nebula.<ref name="PoT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Odos was introduced in ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'', a [[1997]] novel authored by [[Barbara Hambly]].<ref name="PoT" /> It was first described as a planet by the [[1998]] reference book ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', written by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]].<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Odos system, and therefore the planet Odos, in grid square R-7.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
